revision.content:
= About =

Hacklights is a Bloominglabs blog to showcase events, projects, accomplishments, and demonstrate that this group is still active. As of March 2021 we are very much still busy and making in Bloomington, Indiana.


== Articles ==
<!-- I think a blog type in a wiki needs an extension. In theory it would be nice to have a way to search these by tags (project/event/person) not just list by date. -->
<!-- ===May 2021=== -->


===April 2021===
